# Workspace Directory Contents

This document lists all files and folders in the workspace root directory: `/workspaces/agent-feed/prod/agent_workspace`

## Files

### Configuration Files
- `.gitignore` - Git ignore rules
- `.protected` - Protection configuration
- `README.md` - Workspace documentation

### Test Files
- `DESKTOP_HORIZONTAL_SCROLL_COMPREHENSIVE_REPORT.md` - Desktop scroll testing report
- `horizontal-scroll-e2e-test.spec.ts` - E2E test specification for horizontal scroll
- `horizontal-scroll-test-report.md` - Test report for horizontal scroll functionality
- `horizontal-scroll-test-results.json` - JSON results from horizontal scroll tests
- `run-horizontal-scroll-tests.js` - JavaScript test runner for horizontal scroll
- `test-horizontal-scroll.html` - HTML test page for horizontal scroll

### Phase Files
- `PHASE2_SUCCESS.txt` - Phase 2 success indicator
- `PHASE2_TEST.md` - Phase 2 test documentation

## Directories

### Agent Directories
- `agent-feedback-agent/` - Agent feedback functionality
- `agent-ideas-agent/` - Agent for managing ideas
- `agents/` - General agents directory
- `dynamic-page-testing-agent/` - Dynamic page testing agent
- `follow-ups-agent/` - Follow-up task management agent
- `get-to-know-you-agent/` - User onboarding agent
- `link-logger-agent/` - Link logging functionality
- `meeting-next-steps-agent/` - Meeting action items agent
- `meeting-prep-agent/` - Meeting preparation agent
- `meta-update-agent/` - Meta update functionality
- `page-builder-agent/` - Page building agent
- `page-verification-agent/` - Page verification agent
- `personal-todos-agent/` - Personal todo management
- `test-agent-manual/` - Manual test agent
- `test-agent-validation/` - Test validation agent

### System Directories
- `.swarm/` - Swarm configuration
- `data/` - Data storage
- `logs/` - System logs
- `memories/` - Agent memories
- `outputs/` - Generated outputs
- `shared/` - Shared resources
- `temp/` - Temporary files

### Testing Directories
- `horizontal-scroll-testing/` - Horizontal scroll test files
- `mobile-testing/` - Mobile testing resources
- `performance-test/` - Performance testing
- `tablet-scroll-testing/` - Tablet scroll testing
- `test-integration/` - Integration tests
- `test-reports/` - Test reports
- `test-validation/` - Test validation
- `test-workspace-creation/` - Workspace creation tests
- `testing/` - General testing
- `typing-animation-tests/` - Typing animation tests

### Special Directories
- `instructions/` - Instruction files
- `it/` - IT-related files
- `reports/` - Generated reports
- `src/` - Source code
- `you/` - User-specific files

## Summary

- **Total Items**: 39 (files and directories)
- **Files**: 10
- **Directories**: 29
- **Agent Directories**: 13
- **Testing Directories**: 10

The workspace contains a comprehensive set of agents, testing frameworks, and utility directories supporting various development and testing activities.
